name: gpu-fleet-monitor
title: GPU Fleet Monitor
description: Monitor GPU/CPU usage across SSH hosts. Connect via Ghostty, Cursor, or tmux.
author: kazzart

commands.name: gpu-fleet
commands.title: GPU Fleet
commands.subtitle: Monitor SSH Hosts
commands.description: Monitor GPU and CPU usage across all SSH hosts

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Terminal Application
preferences.description: Which terminal to use for SSH connections

preferences.name: editorApp
preferences.title: Editor Application
preferences.description: Which editor to use for remote SSH connections

preferences.name: excludedHosts
preferences.title: Excluded Hosts
preferences.description: Comma-separated hostnames to exclude from the fleet list (github.com and * are always excluded).

preferences.name: defaultIdentityFile
preferences.title: Default Identity File for New Hosts
preferences.description: Identity file path to use when adding new hosts (if not specified in the SSH command). Leave empty to omit.

preferences.name: refreshInterval
preferences.title: Refresh Interval (seconds)
preferences.description: How often to refresh host stats
